views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing total monthly burn rate in a large hero number, a donut chart of spending by category, upcoming renewals within 7 days as an alert list, and active/inactive subscription counts. Quick-add FAB in bottom-right.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Add or edit a subscription. Name field with autocomplete suggestions for popular services, amount stepper with currency display, billing cycle picker, category picker with icons, date picker for next renewal, active toggle, payment method picker, and optional notes.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Full list of all subscriptions (active first, then inactive/cancelled), filterable by category and status. Each row shows name, icon, monthly-normalized cost, next renewal date, and billing cycle badge. Swipe to deactivate/delete.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep spending insights: monthly spending trend line chart over past 12 months, category breakdown donut chart with tap-to-drill-down, cost-per-day visualization, year-over-year comparison, and AI-generated savings suggestions (e.g. 'You spend $45/mo on 3 streaming services').

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalMonthlyCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all active subscriptions normalized to monthly cost. Weekly * 4.33, quarterly / 3, semi-annually / 6, annually / 12.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalYearlyCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: totalMonthlyCost * 12 — the annualized total spend on subscriptions.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeSubscriptionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries where isActive == true.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: inactiveSubscriptionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries where isActive == false (cancelled/paused).

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageCostPerSubscription
viewModelComputedProperties.description: totalMonthlyCost / activeSubscriptionCount — mean monthly cost per active subscription.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostExpensiveSubscription
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Name of the active subscription with the highest monthly-normalized cost.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (category displayName, monthly cost) tuples sorted by cost descending for donut chart.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: upcomingRenewals
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active subscriptions with nextRenewalDate within the next 7 days, sorted by date ascending.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlySpendTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Monthly total cost data points over the past 12 months for the line chart, based on when subscriptions were active (using entry date as start).

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategoryName
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The category with the highest total monthly spend — used for insight display.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: savingsInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insights like 'You have 3 streaming services costing $45/mo' or 'Consider annual billing for X to save Y/yr'. Checks for duplicate categories, suggests annual vs monthly savings, flags inactive subs still within trial.

dailyGoal.description: Monthly budget target for total subscription spending. User sets a max monthly budget; the progress ring shows percentage used.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A month where total active subscription cost stays at or below the monthly budget target counts as a streak month. Consecutive under-budget months build the streak.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track month-over-month total subscription cost changes. Compare current month total to 3-month rolling average. Flag if spending increased >10% month-over-month. Track category-level trends to identify growing spend areas.
insights: Monthly cost normalized across all billing cycles (weekly→monthly, annual→monthly) for fair comparison
Category concentration warning: if one category exceeds 40% of total spend
Duplicate category alert: multiple active subscriptions in the same category with specific names
Annual billing savings calculator: for monthly subscriptions, estimate savings if switched to annual (typically 15-20% discount)
Upcoming renewal alerts: subscriptions renewing within 7 days with their cost
Cost creep detection: compare total monthly cost now vs 3 months ago and 6 months ago
Inactive subscription audit: list cancelled subscriptions and total monthly savings from cancellation
Price-per-use estimation: for subscriptions with known typical usage patterns, estimate value
Budget utilization: percentage of monthly budget used, projected overage/underage
